name: Shock Trooper
description: Shock Trooper is a common Commando class mod made by Maliwan in Borderlands 2. It focuses on shock-oriented defence and damage support.
notes: Distinct from most Commando class mods, Shock Trooper boosts three Kill Skills. It can drop randomly from any appropriate loot source.

special.description: At maximum level, it provides +34% Shock Resistance and +58% Electrocution Damage.
